content-research-writer.name: content-research-writer
content-research-writer.description: Assists in writing high-quality content by conducting research, adding citations, improving hooks, iterating on outlines, and providing real-time feedback on each section. Transforms your writing process from solo effort to collaborative partnership.

youtube-thumbnail.description: "Skill for creating and editing Youtube thumbnails that are optimized for click-through rate. This skill should not be used directly, instead use the Thumbnail Designer subagent who can also invoke this skill. Use when the user asks to create a thumbnail from scratch or edit an existing thumbnail."

Supports local files, Google Drive URLs, and YouTube URLs. For spatial reasoning, counting, zooming, or programmatic image analysis, delegates to agentic-vision-gemini (agentic mode with code execution).

planning-with-files.description: Implements Manus-style file-based planning for complex tasks. Creates task_plan.md, findings.md, and progress.md. Use when starting complex multi-step tasks, research projects, or any task requiring >5 tool calls. user-invocable: true allowed-tools:   - Read   - Write   - Edit   - Bash   - Glob   - Grep   - WebFetch   - WebSearch

wp-wpcli-and-ops.description: "Use when working with WP-CLI (wp) for WordPress operations: safe search-replace, db export/import, plugin/theme/user/content management, cron, cache flushing, multisite, and scripting/automation with wp-cli.yml."

This skill should be used when the user asks to create, improve, or brainstorm YouTube video titles, or when working on YouTube content that requires title optimization."

my-creative-writer.name: my-creative-writer
my-creative-writer.description: 一个通用的、可学习用户风格的“去 AI 味”写作助手。它不局限于特定风格，而是通过分析用户的过往作品建立“风格指纹”，并结合严格的“反 AI 腔”法则（拒绝陈词滥调、教科书结构），产出极具人情味、叙事感和个人色彩的高质量文章。适用于任何希望摆脱 AI 机械感的创作者。

cache-components.name: cache-components
cache-components.description: |   Expert guidance for Next.js Cache Components and Partial Prerendering (PPR).    **PROACTIVE ACTIVATION**: Use this skill automatically when working in Next.js projects that have `cacheComponents: true` in their next.config.ts/next.config.js. When this config is detected, proactively apply Cache Components patterns and best practices to all React Server Component implementations.    **DETECTION**: At the start of a session in a Next.js project, check for `cacheComponents: true` in next.config. If enabled, this skill's patterns should guide all component authoring, data fetching, and caching decisions.    **USE CASES**: Implementing 'use cache' directive, configuring cache lifetimes with cacheLife(), tagging cached data with cacheTag(), invalidating caches with updateTag()/revalidateTag(), optimizing static vs dynamic content boundaries, debugging cache issues, and reviewing Cache Component implementations.

gsd-framework-guide.name: gsd-framework-guide
gsd-framework-guide.description: Complete reference for Get Shit Done (GSD) framework installed globally in ~/.claude. youtube-video-hook.description: Skill for creating optimized YouTube video opening hooks (first 5-30 seconds) that maximize viewer retention and watch time. Use when planning video scripts, reviewing video openings, or optimizing existing content for better retention metrics.

opc-banner-creator.name: banner-creator
opc-banner-creator.description: Create banners using AI image generation. Discuss format/style, generate variations, iterate with user feedback, crop to target ratio. Use when user wants to create a banner, header, hero image, cover image, GitHub banner, Twitter header, or readme banner.

Use when user needs spatial reasoning over images, NOT just description. Triggers on: "zoom into X", "count Y in image", "measure Z", "compare regions", or any task requiring programmatic image analysis.

personal-asset-manager.name: personal-asset-manager
personal-asset-manager.description: Analyze, organize, and leverage personal assets (Skills, Languages, Connections) to maximize potential. Integrated with Notion and Memory Vault.

curation-expert.description: Curation Director & Brand Alchemist. Transforms generic products into high-value concepts, bundles, and emotional experiences using strategies like Theme Engineering and Value Stacking. Use when the user wants to curate products, design gift sets, elevate brand concepts, or apply "Bokksu/Sugoi Mart" style marketing.

executing-marketing-campaigns.name: executing-marketing-campaigns
executing-marketing-campaigns.description: Plans, creates, and optimizes marketing campaigns including content strategy, social media, email, and analytics. Helps develop go-to-market strategies, campaign messaging, and performance measurement.

interview-to-article.name: Interview-to-Article
interview-to-article.description: An interactive interview agent that acts as a reporter/editor to extract your thoughts and ghostwrite high-quality articles. Use it when the user has a rough idea but struggles to start writing, or wants to turn a conversation into a polished post.

life-trajectory-deduction.name: life-trajectory-deduction
life-trajectory-deduction.description: A "Fate Modeler" skill that performs a long-term causal deduction of a user's life trajectory (1-50 years). It analyzes current states, choices, and hidden costs to project future outcomes across four key stages (35-40, 40-50, 50-60, 60+), concluding with a "Life Balance Sheet" of assets versus irreversible debts.

startup-metrics-framework.description: This skill should be used when the user asks about "key startup metrics", "SaaS metrics", "CAC and LTV", "unit economics", "burn multiple", "rule of 40", "marketplace metrics", or requests guidance on tracking and optimizing business performance metrics.

xhs-note-creator-template.name: xhs-note-creator

Claude Code generates design docs directly (no API calls). 3-step workflow - build prompt → Claude generates design → batch generation. 30 layouts, 10 styles. Auto-detects image count from content. Defaults to Nano Banana 2 (Flash model). Cost-optimized ($0.0174/image via taobao flash).

internal-comms.name: internal-comms
internal-comms.description: A set of resources to help me write all kinds of internal communications, using the formats that my company likes to use. Use when developing new Amazon products or optimizing listings/operations for any marketplace.

skill-creator.name: skill-creator
skill-creator.description: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Claude's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations.

connect.description: Connect Claude to any app. Send emails, create issues, post messages, update databases - take real actions across Gmail, Slack, GitHub, Notion, and 1000+ services.

opc-seo-geo.name: seo-geo
opc-seo-geo.description: SEO & GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) for websites. Analyze keywords, generate schema markup, optimize for AI search engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Copilot, Claude) and traditional search (Google, Bing). Use when user wants to improve search visibility, search optimization, search ranking, AI visibility, ChatGPT ranking, Google AI Overview, indexing, JSON-LD, meta tags, or keyword research.

frontend-patterns.name: frontend-patterns
frontend-patterns.description: Frontend development patterns for React, Next.js, state management, performance optimization, and UI best practices.

model-authenticity-verifier.name: model-authenticity-verifier
model-authenticity-verifier.description: Verifies if the current Claude environment is genuine or a shadow API substitution. Use when user suspects their API provider is using cheaper models (GLM-4, DeepSeek) instead of real Claude Sonnet 4.6.

mcp-builder.name: mcp-builder
mcp-builder.description: Guide for creating high-quality MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers that enable LLMs to interact with external services through well-designed tools. Use when building MCP servers to integrate external APIs or services, whether in Python (FastMCP) or Node/TypeScript (MCP SDK).

wordpress-router.name: wordpress-router
wordpress-router.description: "Use when the user asks about WordPress codebases (plugins, themes, block themes, Gutenberg blocks, WP core checkouts) and you need to quickly classify the repo and route to the correct workflow/skill (blocks, theme.json, REST API, WP-CLI, performance, security, testing, release packaging)."

tampermonkey.name: tampermonkey
tampermonkey.description: Expert Tampermonkey/Greasemonkey userscript development for browser automation and web enhancement.

mcp-integration.name: MCP Integration
mcp-integration.description: This skill should be used when the user asks to "add MCP server", "integrate MCP", "configure MCP in plugin", "use .mcp.json", "set up Model Context Protocol", "connect external service", mentions "${ANTIGRAVITY_SKILL_ROOT} with MCP", or discusses MCP server types (SSE, stdio, HTTP, WebSocket). Provides comprehensive guidance for integrating Model Context Protocol servers into Antigravity plugins for external tool and service integration.

family-health-guardian.name: family-health-guardian
family-health-guardian.description: Act as a trusted Family Doctor and Health Guardian. Manage family health profiles, provide authentic medical advice considering budget/insurance, and track health history. Integration with memory-vault. Use when user mentions health, sickness, medical advice, family members' well-being, or "档案" (health records).

email-management.name: email-management
email-management.description: >   Multi-account email configuration manager. Stores SMTP/IMAP/MX settings for all   accounts, detects misconfigurations (wrong MX, port changes, provider drift), and   auto-corrects configs by querying live DNS. Priority focus on business domains:   worldinspirelab.com, globalgrowthco.com, glintmuse.com, belovedpals.com, xinchaovi.com.   Use when: checking email health, adding/updating accounts, diagnosing delivery issues,   syncing configs after provider changes.

life-learning-companion.name: Life Learning Companion
life-learning-companion.description: A strategic partner for life analysis. Summarizes experiences, extracts principles, and logs them to Notion.

naturalize-text-localize.name: naturalize-text
naturalize-text-localize.description: 全语言通用翻译与文本人性化。用于跨语言翻译、润色或改写任何语言的文本，重点在于使其地道、自然，移除 AI 味（套话、免责声明、过渡词），并通过简化词汇、短句化、情感细节和受众对齐来提升可信度。

opc-logo-creator.name: logo-creator
opc-logo-creator.description: Create logos using AI image generation. Discuss style/ratio, generate variations, iterate with user feedback, crop, remove background, and export as SVG. Use when user wants to create a logo, icon, favicon, brand mark, mascot, emblem, or design a logo.

remotion.name: remotion
remotion.description: Generate walkthrough videos from Stitch projects using Remotion with smooth transitions, zooming, and text overlays allowed-tools:   - "stitch*:*"   - "remotion*:*"   - "Bash"   - "Read"   - "Write"   - "web_fetch"

china-global-deployment.name: china-global-deployment
china-global-deployment.description: A comprehensive skill for deploying static sites accessible from both China and globally, with emphasis on global performance while maintaining China accessibility.

best-minds.name: best-minds

youtube-channel-scraper.description: Scrape all video metadata from a YouTube channel including titles, views, duration, and publish dates.

mcp-flight-search.name: Flight Search
mcp-flight-search.description: Quick flight search using SerpAPI Google Flights. Real-time pricing from airlines.

stitch-enhance-prompt2.name: enhance-prompt
stitch-enhance-prompt2.description: Transforms vague UI ideas into polished, Stitch-optimized prompts. Enhances specificity, adds UI/UX keywords, injects design system context, and structures output for better generation results. allowed-tools:   - "Read"   - "Write"

security-review.name: security-review
security-review.description: Use this skill when adding authentication, handling user input, working with secrets, creating API endpoints, or implementing payment/sensitive features. Provides comprehensive security checklist and patterns.

clash-verge-guide.name: clash-verge-guide
clash-verge-guide.description: Manage Clash Verge configuration and rules.

interview-user.name: interview-user
interview-user.description: "A specialized skill to guide the user when a task is unclear, but prioritizing proactive solution proposals. Use this skill to front-load clarifications at the START of a task, proposing a 'Best Guess' plan first to maintain agentic momentum and avoid mid-task interruptions."

smart-illustrator.name: smart-illustrator
smart-illustrator.description: 智能配图与 PPT 信息图生成器。支持三种模式：(1) 文章配图模式 - 分析文章内容，生成插图；(2) PPT/Slides 模式 - 生成批量信息图；(3) Cover 模式 - 生成封面图。所有模式默认生成图片，`--prompt-only` 只输出 prompt。支持 Bento Grid 功能展示图风格（--style bento）。触发词：配图、插图、PPT、slides、封面图、thumbnail、cover、bento grid、功能展示图、feature showcase。

strategic-compact.name: strategic-compact
strategic-compact.description: Suggests manual context compaction at logical intervals to preserve context through task phases rather than arbitrary auto-compaction.

wp-performance.name: wp-performance
wp-performance.description: "Use when investigating or improving WordPress performance (backend-only agent): profiling and measurement (WP-CLI profile/doctor, Server-Timing, Query Monitor via REST headers), database/query optimization, autoloaded options, object caching, cron, HTTP API calls, and safe verification."

ecommerce-lp-generator.name: ecommerce-lp-generator
ecommerce-lp-generator.description: 专业的电商详情页(Landing Page)生成技能,采用网格生成技术确保一致性和效率。输入产品图片 -> 输出一系列切片的高清详情页设计图。

obsidian-json-canvas.name: json-canvas
obsidian-json-canvas.description: Create and edit JSON Canvas files (.canvas) with nodes, edges, groups, and connections. Use when working with .canvas files, creating visual canvases, mind maps, flowcharts, or when the user mentions Canvas files in Obsidian.

sora2-video-gen.description: Generate videos using the Sora 2 model via APIMart. Use this skill when the user wants to create videos from text prompts or images using Sora 2.

tts-elevenlabs.name: tts-elevenlabs
tts-elevenlabs.description: Text-to-speech using ElevenLabs. Vivid, human-like voice output. Use when user wants to speak text aloud, generate audio, or convert text to speech.

social-dynamics-mastery.name: Social Dynamics Mastery
social-dynamics-mastery.description: An expert dating and social dynamics coach. Combines confident communication patterns with deep evolutionary psychology and attraction logic. Capable of analyzing complex social situations and generating "Chat Bible" responses.
